name: nuhin13
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins by nuhin13. All plugins are plain Markdown skills with no compiled code, no MCP servers, and no network access. Source is fully auditable on GitHub.

plugins.name: pattern-surgeon
plugins.description: Reactive design-pattern skill for Claude Code. Recommends, applies, and auto-reverts Strategy, Factory, Adapter, Repository, Observer, and Dependency Injection across 9 language stacks (TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, C#, PHP, Kotlin, Dart, Swift). Five modes: suggest, refactor, compare, follow, greenfield. Code-mutating modes use a git checkpoint → verify → rollback safety contract. No network access. No repo scanning. Reads only the file you name.
